0.text: Areas of increased density consistent with pleuroparenchymal scarring in the apical posterobasal section of the right upper lobe

1.text: Minimal regression in peripherally located ground-glass opacities in the left upper lobe compared to previous examination

2.text: Interseptal thickening in the left upper lobe

3.text: Increased pleuroparenchymal density in the posterobasal region of the right lower lobe
